sys_script_include.description:
2.8 | 2022-07-04 | raj | DFCT0011050 - Closing Tasks is NOT DELETING ALL Draft Descendants, they are moved into the "Cancelled" state 2.8 | 2022-07-04 | raj | STRY0124728 - Task Requests- Auto-close Requests when "Information Only Tasks" is auto-completed 2.8 | 2022-07-04 | raj | DFCT0010850 - On the acknowledgment Task, open requests are NOT moving to "Complete" when the task is completed
2.8 | 2022-06-29 | raj | DFCT0011034 - An "Approved" ordered task should NOT cause the next task into "Closed Incomplete" 2.8 | 2022-06-26 | raj | STRY0111263 - Rejecting an Approval Task- Enhance cascade closing tasks to 'Descendants of Parent Approval' and 'Task Order' 2.8 | 2022-06-26 | raj | STRY0123458 - Enhancing SEQ Approval- Approval Tasks no longer needs 'Wait for Subtasks" checked to allow 'Rejecting Approval Subtask' to 'cascade close ancestors' 2.8.0 | 2022-06-07 | raj | STRY0122882 - Publish Task(s) button- New Modal to 'Choose Which Tasks to Publish' 2.8 | 2022-06-03 | raj | STRY0122187 - (REQs Improvement Story) OU Reassignment– Email Notification [N-20] 2.7.3 | 2022-06-02 | raj | STRY0122888 - Closing Tasks will DELETE ALL Draft Descendants 2.8 | 2022-05-06 | mmcc | STRY0115297 - New Task Form- Allow users to start Tasks as Draft Added function uiAction_CreateDraftTask 2.7.3 | 2022-05-12 | raj | DFCT0010918 - Email Notification is NOT working: "Extension Request Approved" 2.7.3 | 2022-05-12 | raj | DFCT0010919 - Email Notification NOT working: Tasks Extension Request Rejected 2.7.3 | 2022-05-12 | raj | DFCT0010920 - Email Notification is NOT working: on the Tasks "Reassignment Request Approved" 2.7.3 | 2022-05-12 | raj | DFCT0010921 - Email Notification is NOT working: on the "Tasks Reassignment Request Rejected" 2.7.3 | 2022-05-12 | raj | DFCT0010923 - Email Notification NOT working: "Extension Request" 2.7.3 | 2022-05-12 | raj | DFCT0010924 - Email Notification is NOT working: "OU Reassignment Request" - When someone rejects Primary Assignee 2.7.3 | 2022-04-20 | raj | DFCT0010827 - "Completed on-time?" field is displaying false for the "Acknowledgement" & "Information Only" 2.7.3 | 2022-04-20 | raj | DFCT0010870 - Reopening a completed "Wait" state parent task using the "This Task Only" option when the children are "completed" causes the task to go back to "Wait" state 2.7.3 | 2022-05-02 | raj | DFCT0010899 - "Information" Task Types in "Wait" or "Draft" states are still marked "Complete" when viewing them 2.7.2 | 2022-02-04 | raj | DFCT0010781 - Publishing task tree from DRAFT show too many notification (moved the info message into the ui action so it isn't called for all sub tasks)
2.7.1 | 2021-12-07 | raj | DFCT0010681 - fixed multilanguage while addressing other issue 2.7.1 | 2021-12-10 | raj | DFCT0010701 - Completing a parent task with a sub task in "Waiting" state throws a Javascript error 2.7.1 | 2021-12-11 | raj | DFCT0010460 - Spelling Errors: "State changed to 'Sent to Rework'" activity log entry contains spelling errors 2.7.1 | 2021-12-13 | raj | DFCT0010460-2 - Spelling Errors: "State changed to 'Sent to Rework'" activity log entry contains spelling errors
2.7 STRY0104349 - Request Extension on Platform does not reload form and should be available from more states STRY0104533 - Respond Extension should be available from more states and available for Task Owner's Task Manager and Task Administrators STRY0101692 - REQ – Respond Clarification Request via Modal - add Task Administrators to the people who can respond STRY0102985 - Respond to reassignement add states and users and correct issues with platform STRY0100724 - DEV Story- Performance Improvements - Running Templates - This function was not used, removed: uiAction_RunTemplateDepr STRY0105845 - DIA- Draft Scheduled Tasks- Create Draft Task State STRY0108329 - DIA- Org Hierarchy– OU Request Form- Email Notification - changed a function to make more specific to Task DFCT0010462 - Spelling mistakes - "Activity" tab in the work notes " extenstion and suspesne are misspelled. 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Added uiAction_ReopenTasks() and reopenTaskInernal() 2.7.0 | 2021-09-22 | mmcc | STRY0108861 - DIA- Cancel from Top Task Notification Added uiAction_CancelTasks() and _cancelTasks() STRY0110317 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the Templates. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new Templates. 2.7.0 | 2021-10-7 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Updated key for Message that goes into var msgReopenedBy 2.7.0 | 2021-10-16 | raj | DFCT0010577 - 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Issues 2.7.0 | 2021-10-21 | raj | DFCT0010592- Task Trees created in "Serial" do NOT "Reopen" from "Top Task" NOTE: this is because task was not closing related tasks correctly. This has been fixed. 2.7.0 | 2021-10-21 | raj | DFCT0010597- Time zone on "Closed" Date and "Actual End" is wrong if user profile is NOT on GMT 2.7.0 | 2021-11-16 | raj | STRY0113839 - Technical Story: Pages/Portal/Page should be picked up from the "Form preferences" 2.7.0 | 2021-11-18 | raj | STRY0114416 - 5- The list below should be fixed to re-submit for certification.
2.6 - Tasker Moible STRY0073598 - FIX- CLA - Clarification Provided Email Notification - Assigned Member, Reviewer, Task manager of the Primary Office (OUTA) or Task Administrator (GTA) STRY0071902 - As a Task Owner and Task manager of the Primary Office (OUTA), I will receive an email notification when the Assigned Member, Reviewer or OUTA of the primary Assignee, or Task Administrator (GTA) has requested clarification. STRY0097883 - HTML Tags - Keep tags on response log always, Keep tags on Activity when under 500 Chars, and strip and trim if over 500 Chars
2.5.405 (patched after 2.6) STRY0101213 - - Modify Email send with attachments to Asyncrhonous call This script include contains the code for all UI Actions for the Task tables in Tasker. All UI Actions should be in here. This file should stay read only so customers and partners can see what we are doing for UI Actions. The UI Action files should be updated to remove the code and only call these functions. The UI Actions should all be unprotected so customers and partners can do different things to meet their needs. This will allow them to seperate thier code from the core code. It will also allow them to see the differences in code between versions of Tasker to allow them to keep their code updated. STRY0094943 - "Actual Start" ONLY populates when "Start Work" is pressed - It should also populate on "Send to Review" and "Mark Complete" - STRY0048709 - pulled the email body as HTML into instructions field, and set the objective to the same value when creating a task from a suggested task NOTE: - ONce moved to the Development environment, each UI Action needs to be checked against the UI Action code for the current UI Actions and updated appropriately.
sys_script_include.name: Task_uiAction
